name: PasswordLockout
rule: User is locked out if: IsLockedOut=true OR (FailedLoginCount > 5 AND (UtcNow - DateLastFailedLoginUtc).Minutes < (FailedLoginCount - 5)). Lock is time-scaled: more failures = longer lockout.

name: AccessTokenTTL
rule: Access token expires after 15 minutes. Refresh token expires after 30 minutes (sliding on each refresh use).
technical_debt: TD_001: TTL is hardcoded in UserController, not configurable via appsettings.json

name: AutoProfileSelection
rule: If user.CurrentProfileId == 0 AND user has exactly 1 accessible profile → auto-set CurrentProfileId to that profile. If multiple profiles → return HTTP 300 (client must prompt user to select).

name: PasswordHashing
rule: Passwords are stored as SHA256(password + salt). Salt is unique per user. Never store plaintext password.
technical_debt: TD: SHA256 is not a password-specific KDF. Should migrate to bcrypt or Argon2id.

name: ProfileAccessControl
rule: User can only access their own data or data of users they manage. Profile access is checked before every profile-scoped operation.

name: SoftDelete
rule: Users are never hard-deleted. User.Deleted=true + DateDeletedUtc=now. Deleted users are excluded from normal queries (inclDeleted=false by default). Can be reactivated via ReactivateUser().

name: LanguageCountryEquality
rule: CountryId and LanguageId on User hold the same value. This is a known design quirk. Do NOT separate them during rebuild without careful migration.
valid_values: Danish (1), Swedish, English, Finnish, Norwegian — from CountryConstants

name: 2FADeliveryMethod
rule: If User.ResetPhone is set: SMS 2FA available. If User.AuthenticatorSecret is set: TOTP available. Email 2FA always available as fallback (uses User.Email). HTTP 428 response triggers 2FA, 300 triggers method selection.

name: UserInitDefaults
rule: New user inherits LanguageId + CountryId + TimeZoneId from their Customer. Default: Danish language, 'Romance Standard Time' timezone. FailedLoginCount=0, IsLockedOut=false.

name: NudgingBlock
rule: A nudge is shown if UserNudgingBlocksDto.broadcastBlocks[NudgeType] = false. User can block permanently (neverAgain=true) or postpone (Survey: 1 hour, stored in localStorage). AuthenticatorApp nudge is specific to identity_access domain.

name: SCIMAuthToken
rule: SCIM 2.0 endpoints authenticated via per-customer bearer token (Customer.ScimTokenUUID). One token per customer. Token validated via IAuthenticationService.ValidateScimCustomerToken().

name: PasswordResetTokenExpiry
rule: PasswordResetToken (Guid) stored on User with DatePasswordResetTokenExpiresUtc. Token validated on /new-password submission. Expired or missing token → rejected.
